name: UDID Disability Certificate Guidance (Sample Record)
description: Sample record for persons seeking official Unique Disability ID and certificate guidance.

benefit.description: Official disability certificate and identity guidance.

other_conditions: Medical assessment and authority verification are required.

ai_explanation.summary: This sample is relevant when a user indicates a disability and needs official identity guidance.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Follow the authority's medical assessment process.

source.organization: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities

name: Disability Support Programme Directory (Sample Record)
description: Sample record directing persons with disabilities to current official support programmes.

benefit.description: Benefits and eligibility vary by the current official programme.

ai_explanation.summary: This sample helps users find current official disability-support programmes.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Review programme criteria and state-specific options.

source.organization: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
